title: hedyotis trimenii var. trimenii
intro: Hedyotis trimenii var. trimenii, also known as Trime's hedyotis, is a plant species belonging to the Rubiaceae family and is native to Sri Lanka. Traditionally, this plant has been used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Hedyotis trimenii var. trimenii include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various infections. It is often used in herbal preparations such as decoctions, infusions, and tinctures to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
